content: Add a replay subcommand so I can re-run a recorded flake against a freshly-built binary.

message.content: Add a replay subcommand so I can re-run a recorded flake against a freshly-built binary.

content.text: Wired up `flake-finder replay <id>` which loads the captured env+stdin from the on-disk record and runs the binary against it. Fails fast if the record is missing.
